product.name: Magic Spoon No-Crash Clean Energy Bar
product.category: Health Foods > Energy Bars > Clean Energy Bars
product.description: A high-protein, low-sugar bar designed for steady, no-crash energy. A cereal-inspired snack bar made with a protein blend and minimal sugar to deliver clean, sustained energy without the typical afternoon slump. Built for busy days, commutes, classes, and gym sessions, this bar provides a convenient, satisfying way to power through without jitters or sugar spikes.
features: Found in the nutrition / snack bar section

competitors.name: RXBAR
competitors.key_feature: Minimal ingredients (egg whites, dates, nuts) with 12g protein and no added sugar

competitors.name: Clif
competitors.key_feature: Plant-based energy bar with sustained energy from organic rolled oats

competitors.name: Kind
competitors.key_feature: Simple whole ingredients you can see and pronounce, gluten-free with nuts and dark chocolate
